description: Public subset of benchmarking results supporting the manuscript. Contains small-n validation, reduced-scale HUBO, and n=200 portfolio results. Large-scale and internal results are not included.

exact_small_validation.description: Exact enumeration vs HAMD on small instances. All C(n,K) feasible assignments evaluated; HAMD match rate reported.

hubo_benchmark.description: Native cubic HAMD vs SA/Tabu (on Rosenberg-quadratized QUBO) on random sparse K-constrained cubic HUBO instances. Public subset: n=50/75/100.
hubo_benchmark.note: n=150 flagship result (>10x gap) corresponds to a larger instance not included in this release.

portfolio_benchmark.description: Cubic Markowitz+sector-coupling portfolio n=200. Objective: min x^T Q x + cubic sector co-movement terms, subject to sum(x)=K=40.
portfolio_benchmark.note: n=300/500/1000 scaling results correspond to larger instances not included in this release.

key_claims.native_advantage: HAMD operating natively on the cubic objective consistently achieves 70-84% lower objective values than SA/Tabu operating on the Rosenberg-quadratized QUBO at n=50–200.
key_claims.correctness: 9/9 exact global optima recovered at n=20–30 (provably correct).
key_claims.scalability: This release verified at n=200. Larger-scale results are reported in the manuscript.
key_claims.quadratization_overhead: Rosenberg augmentation expands n→n+m variables (m≈4n for sparse cubic), adding ~300% variable overhead and introducing a λ-tuning dependency that degrades SA/Tabu landscape quality.
